Beatles入面最愛之一

Paul 出歌詞集

As the shortest month of the year, February flew past, but we still managed to cram in plenty of activity here at PaulMcCartney.com!

The biggest news is the announcement of The Lyrics, an extraordinary book where Paul recounts his life and art through the prism of 154 songs from all stages of his career. Across two volumes, The Lyrics establishes definitive texts of Paul’s songs’ lyrics for the first time and describes the circumstances in which they were written, the people and places that inspired them, and what he thinks of them now.
